RUNESMITH2-AETUS_RUNE.smartDescription:

[gold]击碎:[/gold] 获得{energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}
RUNESMITH2-AETUS_RUNE.title: 岁月
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.description:
卢恩: 给所有非纯光卢恩提供[blue]1[/blue][gold]充能[/gold]和[blue]1[/blue][gold]符能[/gold]
[color=gray][font_size=16]若无作用对象则不会触发被动[/font_size][/color]
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.smartDescription:
[gold]被动:[/gold] 回合结束时,给所有非纯光卢恩提供[blue]1[/blue][gold]充能[/gold]和[blue]1[/blue] [gold]符能[/gold]
[color=gray][font_size=16]若无作用对象则不会触发被动[/font_size][/color]
[gold]击碎:[/gold] 给所有卢恩提供[blue]2[/blue][gold]充能[/gold]和[blue]2[/blue][gold]符能[/gold]
RUNESMITH2-ALBUS_RUNE.title: 纯光
RUNESMITH2-EMPTY_SLOT.description: 被[gold]锻造[/gold]的符文将进入这个栏位,你可以拥有最多[blue]7[/blue]个卢恩
RUNESMITH2-EMPTY_SLOT.title: 卢恩栏位
RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA_RUNE.description: 卢恩: 对随机敌人造成伤害

RUNESMITH2-FLAMMA_RUNE.title: 火焰

RUNESMITH2-FULGOR_RUNE.title: 闪耀
RUNESMITH2-GLACIES_RUNE.description: 卢恩: 对全体敌人施加[blue]2[/blue]点[gold]冰霜[/gold]

RUNESMITH2-GLACIES_RUNE.title: 寒冰

RUNESMITH2-INCENDIUM_RUNE.title: 焚尽
RUNESMITH2-MAGMA_RUNE.description: 卢恩: 对随机敌人造成伤害并将其一半转化为[gold]格挡[/gold]
